src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old path causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to align with Spring Boot 3.2+ auto-configuration changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2 changed the auto-configuration class name or behavior for H2 Console; explicit exclusion is required to prevent conflicts or startup errors in the new version.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for JCacheManagerCustomizer to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer was removed in Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer was removed in Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import paths to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes DataSourceProperties, LiquibaseDataSource, and LiquibaseProperties have been moved to new packages (org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure and org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure) in Spring Boot 3.x; using old paths causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with Environment.matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated/removed in Spring Framework 6.x; using it may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness, and matchesProfiles is the standard replacement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add imports for utility classes used in new logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The new code uses CollectionUtils and StringUtils which were not previously imported; missing imports cause compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The com.fasterxml.jackson classes are no longer available or compatible in the new dependency tree; using them would cause compilation errors due to missing classes or package conflicts.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception type instead of the old one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: JsonProcessingException from com.fasterxml.jackson is no longer the correct exception type; the method must declare JacksonException from tools.jackson to compile.
